options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: chapter_access
options.description:
Determines which items are required to access chapters and shuffles them into the item pool.
- Nothing: No items added, you can enter a chapter just like in the base game.
- Princess: You will only need the princess item to enter a chapter (+23 items)
- Voices: You will need the princess and voice items to access a chapter. (+10 items)
- Both: Chapter access items are completely randomized (+33 items)

options.name: pristine_blade_rando
options.description:
Controls how many Pristine Blades are available and shuffles them into the item pool.
- Nothing: Pristine Blade is not randomized
- One Blade: Only one Pristine Blade is available for the entire game (+1 items)
- Chapter Blade: One Pristine Blade per chapter [The fourth one is for the goddess] (+4 items)
- Princess Blade: One Pristine Blade per princess (+23 items)

options.name: gift_rando
options.description: Shuffles gifts into the item pool as progression items required to complete loops. (+5 items)

options.name: chapter_rando
options.description: Add entering a chapter for the first time as check locations in the world. (+23 locations)

options.name: global_chapter_rando
options.description: Add entering a global chapter (2 and 3) as check locations in the world. (+2 locations)

options.name: heart_rando
options.description: Add hearts (vessels) as check locations in the world. (+29 locations)

options.name: mirror_rando
options.description: Add facing the mirror in the end of the 5 loops as check locations in the world. (+5 locations)

options.name: memoriesanity
options.description:
Chooses to randomize the memories in the world. (+439 locations/items)
- Nothing: Memories are not randomized
- Location: Memories are added as check locations, but the items are not shuffled.
- Both: Memories are both items and locations

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.
options: Pristine Blade - The Eye of the Needle
Pristine Blade - The Princess and the Dragon
Pristine Blade - The Moment of Clarity
Pristine Blade - The Happily Ever After
Pristine Blade - The End of Everything
